UPGMA Tree Building

Unweighted Pair Group Method with Arithmetic Mean — step-by-step

Taxon Names
Distances (upper triangle)
Hum↔Chi
Hum↔Gor
Hum↔Ora
Chi↔Gor
Chi↔Ora
Gor↔Ora
Set taxon names and distances, then click Build Tree to begin the step-by-step visualization.
